name: Heating Controller
description: Intelligent control for heating systems with comfort and eco modes. Supports manual override, boost mode, and model-predictive control (MPC) for optimized energy efficiency. The MPC control moder is in beta stage and development is paused until next heating period! You can already try it or use control mode static if you want to be save.

defaultActive.label: Default active
defaultActive.description: Whether the controller is active by default

reactivateEnabled.label: Re-enable
reactivateEnabled.description: Enables automatic reactivation after manual control

controllerMode.label: Controller mode
controllerMode.description: Static: fixed setpoint. MPC: model-predictive control.

designIndoorTemperatureC.label: Design indoor temperature (°C)
designIndoorTemperatureC.description: Room indoor temperature from the heat load calculation

designOutdoorTemperatureC.label: Design outdoor temperature (°C)
designOutdoorTemperatureC.description: Design outdoor temperature from the heat load calculation

designTemperatureSystem.label: Design temperature system
designTemperatureSystem.description: Heating system design temperatures from the heat load calculation

roomHeatLoadW.label: Room heat load (W)
roomHeatLoadW.description: Calculated room heat load in watts

mpcLearningEnabledByDefault.label: MPC learning enabled by default
mpcLearningEnabledByDefault.description: Whether MPC model adaptation is enabled by default. Use heating available input to control it dynamically.

mpcDemandHysteresisPct.label: MPC demand hysteresis (%)
mpcDemandHysteresisPct.description: Minimum demand change to accept new value (prevents flapping)

mpcHoldOverrideDemandPct.label: MPC hold override threshold (%)
mpcHoldOverrideDemandPct.description: Demand change (%) large enough to bypass the hold time and update immediately

mpcMaxDemandStepPct.label: MPC max demand step (%)
mpcMaxDemandStepPct.description: Maximum demand change per cycle (rate limiter)

trvName.label: TRV name
trvName.description: Identifier used as the output topic prefix for this TRV

heatEmitterType.label: Heat emitter type
heatEmitterType.description: Type of heat emitter connected to this TRV

nominalPowerW.label: Nominal power (W)
nominalPowerW.description: Rated heat output at the selected design temperature system

targetTemperatureStep.label: Temperature step
targetTemperatureStep.description: Rounding step for TRV target temperature

roomTemperatureStrategy.label: Room temperature strategy
roomTemperatureStrategy.description: How the room temperature is estimated from available sensors

options.external: External sensor first (fallback to TRV average)

maxSensorAge.label: Max sensor age
maxSensorAge.description: Maximum age of all sensor values before they are considered stale (0 = no limit)

heatingAvailable.name: Heating available
heatingAvailable.description: Whether heating is currently available (for MPC)

additionalTemperatureSensor.name: Room temperature sensor
additionalTemperatureSensor.description: External room temperature sensor (leading source for MPC)

outdoorTemperature.name: Outdoor temperature
outdoorTemperature.description: Outdoor temperature for improved thermal loss estimation

flowTemperature.name: Flow temperature
flowTemperature.description: Heating circuit flow temperature for heating power estimation

mpcLearningRecalibrate.name: MPC learning recalibrate
mpcLearningRecalibrate.description: Trigger to recalibrate MPC learning with provided factors

persistLearningFactors.name: Persist learning factors
persistLearningFactors.description: Output with current learning factors for persistence (MPC mode)
